boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Sources distinguish via milestone/release IDs per policy.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: MS-VAN-076 lists M-3/R3 and M-4/R4 as separate; STD-VAN-076-P requires milestone ID/release distinction.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow defect remains; distinction satisfies exact rule.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current action boundary closed by register and policy before release.

final_answer: Action may proceed. Invoice INV-VAN-076 (milestone M-4/release R4) is legally distinct from prior paid invoice PRIOR-VAN-076 (milestone M-3/release R3) per MS-VAN-076 register and STD-VAN-076-P policy. Milestone ID and release number provide required distinction on vendor and amount. No open defect blocks AP release of milestone invoice.
